The hosts are unbeaten in three ODI series against their visitors having won two and drawn the other since 2014. They'll also be looking to improve on a record of just one win in seven ODI meetings against the Kiwi's

programme.title: Live: Riyadh Season Snooker Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of the first session on day one of the tournament, which takes place at Globe Theatre in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. This is just the second edition of this competition after its inaugural event last year. The 2024 tournament was won by Northern Ireland's Mark Allen after he beat Belgium's Luca Brecel 5-1 in the final. That victory gave Allen his fifth non-ranking final victory, 15 years after his first at the Jiangsu Classic
